query:
SELECT 
  u.id as corretorId,
  u.name as corretorNome,
  COUNT(c.id) as totalContratos,
  COALESCE(SUM(c.valorVenda), 0) as vgvTotal
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN contratos c ON c.corretorId = u.id
WHERE u.role = 'corretor'
GROUP BY u.id, u.name
HAVING totalContratos > 0
ORDER BY vgvTotal DESC
LIMIT 10;
